title: Uniface Products that Use Connectors
text: Uniface Products that Use Connectors The following Uniface products can run on any DBMS system, provided that the DBMS connector is available: Table 1. Uniface Products Product Description Uniface Runtime Engine Application development and run time system. Uniface IDE Development tool for building Uniface applications. Uniface Server Remote server for Uniface clients. These products can access multiple DBMS connectors concurrently, allowing you to make the best use of a heterogeneous DBMS environment.
